aiTrends.name: AWESOME-OCR-LLM
aiTrends.description: OCR in the Era of Large Language Models

aiTrends.name: mlops-for-devops
aiTrends.description: MLOps for DevOps Engineers - A hands-on, project-based guide to Machine Learning Operations

aiTrends.name: MLEvolve
aiTrends.description: MLEvolve is an open-source autonomous system for end-to-end machine learning algorithm design and optimization powered by progressive search and experience-driven memory.

aiTrends.name: howaiworks
aiTrends.description: How AI Works is a self-contained, static website that walks through the entire history of artificial intelligence and machine learning through 50 interactive model demos spanning over 200 years.

aiTrends.name: Foundations-of-Medical-LLMs
aiTrends.description: Foundations of Medical Large Language Model Learning

aiTrends.name: Awesome-ML-AI-Tutorial
aiTrends.description: A comprehensive mathematics tutorial for Machine Learning and AI

aiTrends.name: android-bench
aiTrends.description: Android Bench is a framework for benchmarking Large Language Models (LLMs) on Android development tasks. It evaluates an AI model's ability to understand mobile codebases, generate accurate patches, and solve Android-specific engineering problems.

aiTrends.name: rag-techniques-playbook
aiTrends.description: A comprehensive catalog of 34 Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques. Features Python pseudocode, pros/cons, and architecture concepts ranging from basic retrieval to advanced agentic RAG, GraphRAG, and self-correcting workflows.

aiTrends.name: Credit-Card-Fraud-Detection-ML
aiTrends.description: End-to-end Credit Card Fraud Detection using Machine Learning with SMOTE, Random Forest, and ROC-AUC evaluation.

aiTrends.name: AI-Voice-Changer-Real-Time-2026
aiTrends.description: AI Voice-Changer Real-Time 2026 is advanced AI voice changer software powered by deep learning and neural networks for real-time voice transformation. Perfect for streaming, gaming, Discord, Zoom, and content creation, it offers low latency, HD audio quality, custom voice effects, and GPU acceleration for professional voice modulation

aiTrends.name: TalkType
aiTrends.description: TalkType is a cross-platform application built with Electron, supporting Windows, macOS, and Linux. By combining Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) with Large Language Models (LLM), it goes beyond simple dictation to offer "Understanding", "Polishing", and "Q&A" capabilities — your all-in-one voice writing assistant.

aiTrends.name: ai_portfolio
aiTrends.description: A personal portfolio built with Human and Artificial Intelligence.

aiTrends.name: Engine-Failure-Prediction
aiTrends.description: Engine Failure Detection using IoT and ML monitors engine parameters like temperature, vibration, pressure, and RPM using ESP32 sensors. Machine learning models analyze real-time data to predict failures early, reducing breakdowns, downtime, and maintenance costs.

aiTrends.name: python-for-ai-ml
aiTrends.description: An open-source guide to Python for AI and Machine Learning

aiTrends.name: agent-studio-starter
aiTrends.description: Stop building AI agents from scratch. Bootstrap starter Agent app with LangGraph, CopilotKit, and beautiful Generative UIs.

aiTrends.name: academic_paper_generation
aiTrends.description: This project aims to assist researchers in quickly generating high-quality academic papers or reports. By integrating multiple academic literature retrieval sources and large language models (LLM), and combining Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) technology, it enables the full-process automation from literature collection to report writing.

aiTrends.name: llm-phacking
aiTrends.description: Replication archive for "Do Claude Code and Codex P-Hack? Sycophancy and Statistical Analysis in Large Language Models"

aiTrends.name: CT-Kidney-Classification-using-ML-DL
aiTrends.description: CT Kidney Disease Classification using Machine Learning ncluding SVM, Logistic Regression, Decision Tree and CNN with performance evaluation and visualization.

aiTrends.name: Nano-Banana-Helper
aiTrends.description: Nano Banana Helper is a powerful macOS application for batch processing image edits using Google's generative AI (Gemini). It allows users to orchestrate complex image transformation workflows, manage costs, and organize projects efficiently.

aiTrends.name: Enterprise-RAG-Stack
aiTrends.description: A modular framework for building scalable Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) applications. This repository provides a clean separation of concerns, moving beyond simple scripts into a robust, factory-based architecture that supports multiple LLM providers, advanced text processing, and scalable vector storage.
